hero.headline: Your Inland Empire Pool Experts Since 1984
hero.subheadline: From weekly maintenance to full pool construction, Redlands Pool & Spa Center is the one-stop destination your backyard deserves. Over 40 years of local expertise means you get clear water, reliable equipment, and a team that treats every pool like their own.

services.label: Full-Service Pool & Spa Destination
services.headline: Every Pool & Spa Service<br class="hidden md:block"> Under One Roof
services.subtitle: Retail store, weekly maintenance, equipment repair, construction, and hot tub sales — Redlands Pool & Spa Center handles it all so you never have to call around.

cards.title: Weekly Pool & Spa Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly service to keep your pool and spa crystal clear, chemically balanced, and running at peak performance all year long.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Installation
cards.description: Pumps, heaters, filters, automation systems — our technicians with 50+ years of combined experience diagnose and fix it right the first time.

cards.title: Pool Construction & Remodeling
cards.description: Licensed C53 contractor building dream pools and renovating existing ones with smart technology, energy-efficient equipment, and custom backyard designs.

cards.title: Water Testing & Chemical Supply
cards.description: Walk in for free computerized BioGuard water analysis. Walk out with a personalized treatment plan and every chemical your pool needs.

cards.title: Hot Tub & Spa Sales
cards.description: Authorized Hot Spring dealer with a full showroom of portable hot tubs. Professional delivery, expert installation, and ongoing support included.

cards.title: Retail Pool & Spa Supplies
cards.description: Your one-stop shop for pool parts, energy-efficient equipment, floats, toys, backyard accessories, and Big Green Egg grills.

steps.title: Bring In a Water Sample
steps.description: Stop by our store at 310 Alabama St. in Redlands. Our free computerized BioGuard water test gives you a detailed analysis and personalized treatment plan in minutes.

steps.title: We Tailor Your Service Plan
steps.description: Whether you need weekly maintenance, equipment repair, or a full pool remodel, our team builds a plan around your pool, your budget, and your schedule.

steps.title: Enjoy Crystal Clear Water
steps.description: Relax knowing your pool and spa are in the hands of Inland Empire pros with over 40 years of experience. We handle the work so you enjoy the water.

about.label: Why Inland Empire Families Choose Us
about.headline: 40+ Years of Keeping the Inland Empire Swimming
about.description: Since 1984, Redlands Pool & Spa Center has been the trusted name for pool and spa care across Redlands, Yucaipa, Loma Linda, Highland, and beyond. We are a family-run, full-service operation — not a franchise, not a side hustle. Our technicians carry over 50 years of combined hands-on experience, and every one of them treats your backyard like their own.

features.title: 50+ Years Combined Experience
features.description: Our service team brings over half a century of combined pool and spa expertise to every job — from routine cleanings to complex equipment overhauls.

features.title: Authorized Dealer Network
features.description: Factory-authorized dealer for Hayward, Pentair, Zodiac, Hot Spring, BioGuard, and Big Green Egg. You get genuine parts and warranty-backed service.

features.title: Your Complete Backyard Partner
features.description: Retail, maintenance, repair, construction, and hot tub sales — everything under one roof so you never have to coordinate between multiple vendors.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. Real Value.
pricing.subtitle: From a single water test to full weekly service — choose what fits your pool and your budget. Call us for an honest quote.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If your pool or spa water is not crystal clear after our service, we come back and make it right at no additional charge. We have stood behind that promise for over 40 years — and we are not stopping now.

faqs.question: How do I get started with weekly maintenance?
faqs.answer: Just give us a call at (909) 793-9082 or stop by our store at 310 Alabama St. in Redlands. We will assess your pool, recommend a service plan, and can usually schedule your first visit within a few days.

faqs.question: Do you service pools outside of Redlands?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We serve Redlands, Loma Linda, Yucaipa, Highland, Beaumont, and the surrounding Inland Empire area. Many of our loyal customers have been with us for 10, 15, even 25 years across these communities.

faqs.question: Is the water testing really free?
faqs.answer: Yes, 100% free. Bring a water sample to our store and our computerized BioGuard testing stations will analyze it in minutes. You will receive a detailed printout with a personalized chemical treatment plan — no purchase required.

faqs.question: What hot tub brands do you carry?
faqs.answer: We are an authorized Hot Spring dealer and carry a full showroom of portable hot tub models. Stop by to see them in person and our team will help you find the right fit for your space and budget, including delivery and installation.

faqs.question: Are you licensed for pool construction?
faqs.answer: Yes. We hold a California Swimming Pool Construction license (C53-494950) and have completed pool builds and major remodels throughout the Inland Empire. From backyard design to smart pool technology, we handle it all.

testimonials.name: J.P.
testimonials.text: Redlands Pool and Spa Center has taken care of our pool in Yucaipa for over 10 years. Honest and dependable service.

testimonials.name: B.S.
testimonials.text: A very professional operation. Top notch sales staff and expert delivery and installation crew delivered my new Hot Springs Aria without a hitch.

testimonials.name: A.S.
testimonials.text: Been coming here from East Highlands and Redlands during the past 25 years for pool products, service, repair and new equipment.

contact.headline:
Ready for Clear Water
All Year Round?
contact.subtitle: Stop by our Redlands store for a free water test, or call for an honest quote on any pool or spa service. Over 40 years of trust — no pressure, just expertise.

footer.description: Family-owned pool & spa center serving the Inland Empire since 1984. Retail, service, construction, and hot tub sales.
